lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨਨ ਸਰਨਨ ਸੰਤਨ ਬੰਦਨ ॥ ਸੁਖੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਹੀ ॥ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਪਤਿ ਹਰੀ ॥ ਮਿਲੇ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਰੀ ॥੩॥੩॥੧੪੩॥
lines.translit: charanan saranan santan bandan | sukho sukh paahee | naanak tapat haree | mile prem piree |3|3|143|
lines.english: The Sanctuary of the Lord's Feet, and dedication to the Saints these bring me peace and pleasure. O Nanak, my burning fire has been put out, obtaining the Love of the Beloved. ||3||3||143||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਹਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਓ ਲੋਇਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gureh dikhaaeo loeinaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Guru has revealed Him to my eyes. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਨ ਕਰਨਾ ਧਾਰਨ ਧਰਨਾ ਏਕੈ ਏਕੈ ਸੋਹਿਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaaran karanaa dhaaran dharanaa ekai ekai sohinaa |2|
lines.english: You are the Creator, the Cause of causes, the Support of the earth; You are the One and only, Beauteous Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਤਹਿ ਊਤਹਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਤੂੰਹੀ ਤੂੰਹੀ ਮੋਹਿਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eeteh aooteh ghatt ghatt ghatt ghatt toonhee toonhee mohinaa |1|
lines.english: Here and there, in each and every heart, and each and every being, You, O Fascinating Lord, You exist. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਪਰਸਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਦਰਸਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੋਇਨਾ ॥੩॥੪॥੧੪੪॥
lines.translit: santan parasan balihaaree darasan naanak sukh sukh soeinaa |3|4|144|
lines.english: Meeting the Saints, and beholding the Blessed Vision of their Darshan, Nanak is a sacrifice to them; he sleeps in absolute peace. ||3||4||144||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਓਹੁ ਅਗਹ ਅਤੋਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sang sahaaee chhodd na jaaee ohu agah atolaa |1|
lines.english: The Lord is my Companion and Helper; He shall not forsake me or leave me. He is unfathomable and unequalled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam amolaa |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is priceless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ohu sehaj suhelaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It brings peace and poise. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਚੋਲੑਾ ॥੩॥੫॥੧੪੫॥
lines.translit: alakh lakhaaeaa gur te paaeaa naanak ihu har kaa cholaa |3|5|145|
lines.english: The Invisible Lord is seen through the Guru; O Nanak, this is the wondrous play of the Lord. ||3||5||145||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਭਾਈ ਬਾਪੁ ਮੋਰੋ ਮਾਈ ਭਗਤਨ ਕਾ ਓਲੑਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: preetam bhaaee baap moro maaee bhagatan kaa olaa |2|
lines.english: He is my Beloved, my brother, father and mother; He is the Support of His devotees. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁਨੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਿਬਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aapunee bhagat nibaeh |
lines.english: Please help me sustain my devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਹੋਇ ਸਕਾਰਥੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਚਰਨ ਬਸਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath hoe sakaarath hiradai charan basaeh |1|
lines.english: With the wealth of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, life becomes fruitful. Lord, please place Your Feet within my heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਆਇਓ ਆਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur aaeo aaeh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord Master, I have come to You. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਏਹ ਜੁਗਤਾ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eeh mukataa eeh jugataa raakhahu sant sangaeh |2|
lines.english: This is liberation, and this is the best way of life; please, keep me in the Society of the Saints. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਉ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਹਿ ॥੩॥੬॥੧੪੬॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaavau sehaj samaavau naanak har gun gaeh |3|6|146|
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, I am absorbed in celestial peace; O Nanak, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||6||146||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਸੇਵ ਕਮਾਇਆ ਗੁਨ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਿ ਗਾਵੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aap gavaaeaa sev kamaaeaa gun ras ras gaave |1|
lines.english: They eradicate their self-conceit and serve the Lord; drenched in His Love, they sing His Glorious Praises. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਚਰਣ ਸੁਹਾਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur charan suhaave |
lines.english: The Feet of my Lord and Master are so Beautiful!

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤਨ ਪਾਵੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har santan paave |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord's Saints obtain them. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਹਿ ਆਸਾ ਦਰਸ ਪਿਆਸਾ ਆਨ ਨ ਭਾਵੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ekeh aasaa daras piaasaa aan na bhaave |2|
lines.english: They place their hopes in Him, and they thirst for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. Nothing else is pleasing to them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਤੁਹਾਰੀ ਕਿਆ ਜੰਤ ਵਿਚਾਰੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਵੇ ॥੩॥੭॥੧੪੭॥
lines.translit: deaa tuhaaree kiaa jant vichaaree naanak bal bal jaave |3|7|147|
lines.english: This is Your Mercy, Lord; what can Your poor creatures do? Nanak is devoted, a sacrifice to You. ||3||7||147||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ek simar man maahee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remember the One Lord in meditation within your mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਬਸਾਵਹੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaavahu ridai basaavahu tis bin ko naahee |1|
lines.english: Meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and enshrine Him within your heart. Without Him there is no other. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਨੀ ਆਈਐ ਸਰਬ ਫਲ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਗਲੇ ਦੁਖ ਜਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prabh saranee aaeeai sarab fal paaeeai sagale dukh jaahee |2|
lines.english: Entering God's Sanctuary, all rewards are obtained, and all pains are taken away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅਨ ਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਆਹੀ ॥੩॥੮॥੧੪੮॥
lines.translit: jeean ko daataa purakh bidhaataa naanak ghatt ghatt aahee |3|8|148|
lines.english: He is the Giver of all beings, the Architect of Destiny; O Nanak, He is contained in each and every heart. ||3||8||148||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ਸਰਬ ਫਲ ਪਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਸੁਖੀਆ ਹੂਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaavai sarab fal paavai so jan sukheea hooaa |1|
lines.english: One who meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, obtains all rewards. That person becomes happy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਸੋ ਮੂਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bisarat so mooaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who forgets the Lord is dead. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੁ ਕਹਾਵੈ ਹਉ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਬਾਧਿਓ ਨਲਿਨੀ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਸੂਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raaj kahaavai hau karam kamaavai baadhio nalinee bhram sooaa |2|
lines.english: One who calls himself a king, and acts in ego and pride, is caught by his doubts, like a parrot in a trap. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਥੀਆ ॥੩॥੯॥੧੪੯॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jis satigur bhettiaa so jan nihachal theea |3|9|149|
lines.english: Says Nanak, one who meets the True Guru, becomes permanent and immortal. ||3||9||149||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੧੪ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 ghar 14 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Fourteenth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਰਚੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo prabh bhaavai janam na aavai | har prem bhagat har preet rachai |1|
lines.english: One who is pleasing to God shall not be reincarnated again. He remains absorbed in the loving devotional worship of the Lord, in the Love of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਨੇਹੁ ਨਵੇਲਾ ॥ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਗਿ ਰਹੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ohu nehu navelaa | apune preetam siau laag rahai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: That love is forever fresh and new, Which is for the Beloved Lord. ||1||Pause||
